zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté於大約1173年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內拉 費艾-馬瑟時，她的父親Gautier De La Ferté II35歲，母親Eve de Langoree24歲。她於1193年與Raoul De Roye I在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1254年在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté于大约1173年出生在法国巴-諾門迪奧內拉 費艾-馬瑟时，她的父亲Gautier De La Ferté II35岁，母亲Eve de Langoree24岁。她于1193年与Raoul De Roye I在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1254年在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Ferté
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German:
variant of   Fett   or   Fath  .
from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with frid ‘peace’ like Friedrich for example.

variants.name: Fetty
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German   Fette   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Fettig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Mathias, Benno, Helmut, Kurt, Wendelin.
German:
in the north, a patronymic from   Fette  .

variants.name: Fett
meanings: North German: nickname for a fat man, from Middle Low German vett ‘fat’.
English: nickname from Middle English fet(te), fait ‘suitable, becoming, comely’ (Old French fait). Compare Fettes .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named with Old Norse fit ‘meadow’.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté was born about 1173, in La Ferté-Macé, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Gautier De La Ferté II, was 35 and her mother, Eve de Langoree, was 24. She married Raoul De Roye I in 1193, in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1254, in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté est née environ 1173, à La Ferté-Macé, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Gautier De La Ferté II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Eve de Langoree, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul De Roye I en 1193, à Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1254, à Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 82 ans.

Sie hat 1193 in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Raoul De Roye I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1254 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

ko.La Ferté-Bernard, Sarthe, Pays de la Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 라 퍼트e-버나르드
ko.lifeSummary: Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté(이)가 대략 1173년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 라 퍼트e-마ce에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gautier De La Ferté II(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve de Langoree(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1193년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 로예에서 Raoul De Roye I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 몽디디어에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté nasceu aproximadamente 1173, em La Ferté-Macé, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Gautier De La Ferté II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Eve de Langoree, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul De Roye I em 1193, em Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.La Ferté-Bernard, Sarthe, Pays de la Loi: ла фиртe-бирнард, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie-Marguerite De La Ferté родилась около 1173 г. в местности ла фиртe-макe, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gautier De La Ferté II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve de Langoree, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul De Roye I в 1193 г. в местности рои, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1254 г. в местности монтдидиир, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 82 лет.

Se casó con Raoul De Roye I en 1193, en Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1254, en Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 82 años.
